description_long: This is a large, industrial-style air conditioner unit with a robust, rectangular metal housing and reinforced concrete base supports. The front features a prominent black grille with horizontal slats for air intake or output, alongside a recessed control panel area. The sides are equipped with additional vented panels, and one side has thick, insulated cables emerging from the lower section, suggesting a high-capacity electrical connection. The back is plain, with a smooth metallic surface and two vertical concrete supports. The top is flat and metallic, suitable for outdoor or semi-outdoor urban installations such as on sidewalks, in alleys, or near building exteriors. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with a focus on durability and functionality.
description: A large, industrial air conditioner with a metal body, black grille, and concrete supports, featuring visible cables and vented panels. Designed for robust urban use.
description_view_0: The back view shows a plain metallic surface with two vertical concrete supports on either side and no visible vents or controls.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a handle, a vented panel, and three thick cables exiting the lower section, with one concrete support visible.
description_view_2: The front view displays a large black grille with horizontal slats, a recessed control panel area, and both concrete supports at the base.
description_view_3: The right side view features a rectangular vented panel and a single concrete support, with no cables or controls visible.
attribute_grille_pattern: Horizontal slats, closely spaced, covering most of the front face in a rectangular arrangement.
attribute_control_panel_location: front right, recessed area next to the main grille
attribute_exhaust_vent_design: Single large front vent with horizontal slats; additional side vent with vertical slats; both are rectangular and integrated into the metal housing.
